title: Rituals of the Wilds
description: Mod about slavic mythology and very unique magic systems
body:
![Main Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Rituals_Of_The_Wilds/MP_RitualsOfTheWilds_header.webp)

![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Rituals_Of_The_Wilds/MP_RitualsOfTheWilds_description.webp)

## **Rituals of the Wilds (RotW) – A Slavic Mythology Mod**

Step into the mystical world of Rituals of the Wilds, a mod inspired by the rich folklore and ancient traditions of Slavic mythology. Dive into a land where nature holds deep secrets, rituals shape reality, and spirits roam the wilds.

## Rituals of the Wilds Mod - Open Source Available

Please note that RotW is no longer actively under development. However, the mod’s source code and all necessary resources are now available for you to explore, modify, and continue working with. You can access everything you need on GitHub:

🔗 [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/jenki258/rituals_of_the_wilds_code)

Feel free to fork, edit, or fix bugs to make it your own! Just remember to respect the original licensing terms. Enjoy, and happy modding!

## Key Features of version 1.0.4:

- 🌿 Ritual, Alchemy, Dialogue, Quest System.
- 👺 New Mobs: Domovoi, Chernobog & Leshy
- 🏡 Decorational Blocks – Build with an array of new blocks to create rustic villages, mystical shrines, or eerie cursed settlements.
- 👒 New Hat: Straw Hat – Embrace the traditional look with a stylish straw hat, perfect for wandering the wilds.(Or summoning Domovoi!)
- 🛠️ Tons of New Items & Mechanics – Uncover unique artifacts, craft powerful tools, and experience new gameplay elements rooted in Slavic mythology.

**Are you ready to embrace the untamed magic of the wilds? Prepare your rituals, beware of the spirits, and forge your own path in this enchanted world! 🌙✨**

## Big thanks for support to this mod:
- To LichKingRenja for inviting/making this little team of developers, artists and builders as also big thanks to him for financially helpin me(JenkiMods)
- To Sir_Robson for promoting this mod and being just a good person
- To TheNorthernHarpy for Models to blocks, entities for mod!
- To Ember for amazing structures for mod!
  
I hope one day i(JenkiMods) will be capable of making more dreams come true!

As also i hope everyone has a good time of the day!
